# MuleSoft CloudHub

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of CloudHub documentation.
> See [CloudHub llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cloudhub/llms-full.txt) for all the CloudHub documentation in one file.

## Content

- [CloudHub to CloudHub 2.0 Application Migration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/cloudhub/app-migration.md)
